top_signals.title: Crypto industry braces for quantum computing threat
top_signals.summary: Threat to code that underpins bitcoin has moved ‘from theoretical to credible’, industry figures warn
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The European cars made in China
top_signals.summary: Western automakers are taking advantage of Chinese overcapacity to export lower-cost vehicles to their home markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lithuanian lawmakers shelter, Vilnius air traffic suspended due to drone incursion
top_signals.summary: A drone violated Lithuanian airspace on Wednesday, the latest in a series of security incidents in the Baltic region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Japan’s new ’blue tickets’ are putting cycling parents on edge
top_signals.summary: Parents say the new system has made them more mindful of the rules, but has also heightened concerns about child-seat use and children starting to cycle on their own.
